name: Marketing Cloud Release Notes – 18 Nov 2025
body: [{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"OVERVIEW"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"As a part of the current UI rollout, we are unveiling an updated flow for our Footer Management feature."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"To learn more, kindly read ahead!!"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]},{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"FOOTER MANAGEMENT UI REVAMP"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"We have made significant changes in how Marketing Cloud users can create a new footer for their emails. Henceforth, footer creation involves a three-step process. In the first step, you must choose and fill out some basic details, such as name and preference pages, to be used within the footer."}]},{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/DGWF8A4LOBUE/footer13.png","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/DGWF8A4LOBUE/footer13.png","name":"footer13.png","type":"image/png","size":214756,"width":2845,"height":1309,"displaySize":"large","float":"none","downloadUrl":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/api/v2/media/download-by-url?url=https%3A%2F%2Fus.v-cdn.net%2F6038474%2Fuploads%2FDGWF8A4LOBUE%2Ffooter13.png","active":true,"mediaID":1460,"dateInserted":"2025-11-18T13:57:04+00:00","insertUserID":2012,"foreignType":"embed","foreignID":"2012","embedType":"image"}},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Most notably, in the second step, you can now design and customize the footer of your choice by using either the “"},{"text":"Drag & Drop","bold":true},{"text":"” or “"},{"text":"WYSIWYG","bold":true},{"text":"” editor type. In both editor methods, you can design the footer with the available tools at hand, or you can embed your own HTML scripts within the design canvas."}]},{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/KL4DE9VSQBMG/footer14.png","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/KL4DE9VSQBMG/footer14.png","name":"footer14.png","type":"image/png","size":277264,"width":2816,"height":1440,"displaySize":"large","float":"none","downloadUrl":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/api/v2/media/download-by-url?url=https%3A%2F%2Fus.v-cdn.net%2F6038474%2Fuploads%2FKL4DE9VSQBMG%2Ffooter14.png","active":true,"mediaID":1461,"dateInserted":"2025-11-18T13:57:15+00:00","insertUserID":2012,"foreignType":"embed","foreignID":"2012","embedType":"image"}},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"A dedicated preview page is shown to you at the end of every footer design session (third step), where you can make final adjustments to the footer layout."}]},{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/83XWXYSFM5B7/footer15.png","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/83XWXYSFM5B7/footer15.png","name":"footer15.png","type":"image/png","size":255183,"width":2845,"height":1410,"displaySize":"large","float":"none","downloadUrl":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/api/v2/media/download-by-url?url=https%3A%2F%2Fus.v-cdn.net%2F6038474%2Fuploads%2F83XWXYSFM5B7%2Ffooter15.png","active":true,"mediaID":1462,"dateInserted":"2025-11-18T13:57:27+00:00","insertUserID":2012,"foreignType":"embed","foreignID":"2012","embedType":"image"}},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"To learn further about this new UI flow overhaul, read our "},{"type":"a","url":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/705-footer-management","target":"_blank","children":[{"text":"Footer Management","bold":true}]},{"text":" article."}]}]
